title: Aiden's Tech
description: A technological mod made for adding more technology to Minecraft, much like mods like Hbm's Nuclear Tech mod. This also includes firearms, such as the Mosin-Nagant, M16, and M1911.
body:
# CANCELLED
Sorry boys, pack it up. [this link](https://modrinth.com/mod/cravings)

![jetpack, oil, gas pump, and an m16](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b5f5b6d69b693cd0bc1235a7009fe5c3f626693f.png)\
Aiden's Tech is a technological mod made for adding more technology to Minecraft, much like other mods like Hbm's Nuclear Tech mod. This also includes firearms, such as the Mosin-Nagant, M16, and M1911.

# Installation Guide
**This guide shows you how to install Aiden's Tech to Minecraft.**
## Modrinth App
Click the + icon in the bottom left corner.\
![+ button](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c3cbaf3350564a582525392507ae930a2b144485.png)\
Under name, type whatever you want. It's best to name it "Aiden's Tech", as it indicates that the instance is for launching the Aiden's Tech mod. Under loader, click Neoforge. Under game version, click the latest version that Aiden's Tech is in. for Alpha 1.0, do 1.20.6. You should now have a new instance called something like Aiden_s Tech.\
![instance button](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea5023714936ed2b66e4745f386b6a1864a70109.png)\
Click on the instance, **but do not click the play button.**\
![DON'T CLICK THE PLAY BUTTON!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0ae9f8cbb746eada027e57f48abb55c31ac33f6a.png)\
Now you should be in the instance menu. Click on the dropdown near Add content.\
![Click the dropdown.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d63d6c1a02a7c40afa3c3a565eca0eb98647a401.png)\
Now, click on Add from file.\
![Add from file button.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/18d8d5031a1a0481f5599ced39ed2d376ed74669.png)\
A new file explorer tab will open up so that you can select your .jar file and install it to your instance.\
Now, from the Aiden's Tech page, install the latest version, right now being Alpha 1.0.\
Now that you have it installed, it should show up in the file explorer tab.\
![.jar file with aidens_technology](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a8bf093ce415d81a768dcdc066eecfb32f842164.png)\
Double click the file, and it should now install to the instance.\
Now that the installation is finished, you can finally click Play and enjoy Aiden's Tech.
